evaluation.summary: Regularized LDAB correction factors for primorial bases converge to unity without negative values for variants v2 and v3, confirming analytical expectations at higher primorial scales.
next_directions: Extend testing to larger primorial bases (e.g., 30030, 510510) to assess asymptotic behavior.
Derive a rigorous theoretical proof linking the correction factor variants to the underlying LDAB model.
Investigate the impact of numerical precision settings on the stability of the correction factors.
